release_notes: Thin-client refactor — removes Stripe SDK and embedded secret key from the desktop binary; HMAC signing key now injected at build time.
changelog: Remove Stripe.net SDK from XLL — Upgrade Premium now opens the Site /pricing page in the browser; the Site owns Stripe Checkout end-to-end
Remove DPAPI-encrypted Stripe secret key infrastructure (PCI / Stripe-ToS exposure eliminated)
Remove dead EF Core / DbContext / repository layer (UtilityMenuAPI is the sole DB owner)
Remove obsolete UtilityMenu.Api project (superseded by UtilityMenuAPI repo)
Inject HMAC licensing signing key at build time via AssemblyMetadataAttribute (CI secret LICENSING_HMAC_SIGNING_KEY)
Approximate 5MB binary size reduction from removed SDKs
